description_long: This is a vintage black convertible coupe car with a classic, elongated body and rounded fenders. The vehicle features a soft tan fabric roof that is folded down, revealing a spacious interior with brown leather seats and a wooden dashboard. The car has two large side-mounted spare wheels, prominent headlamps, and a chrome front bumper. Its doors are long and streamlined, with chrome handles and trim accentuating the elegant design. The rear of the car is slightly elevated, with a luggage rack and red taillights. The overall appearance is reminiscent of luxury automobiles from the early to mid-20th century, exuding sophistication and timeless style.
description: A vintage black convertible coupe car with a tan folded roof, brown leather interior, and classic rounded fenders. It features chrome accents, side-mounted spare wheels, and a luxurious, elongated body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, tan folded roof, brown seats, and side-mounted spare wheel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tan folded roof, brown interior, and chrome bumper details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, including the spare wheel and chrome trim.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the prominent headlamps, chrome bumper, and rounded fenders.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
